title: Figure 4 in Species-specific PCR primers for identification of the sibling species Chironomus plumosus (Linnaeus, Į758) and Chironomus balatonicus (Devai, Wuelker et Scholl, Į983) (Chironomidae, Diptera)
author: Gunderina, Larissa I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4. PCR products (MAR6) obtained with the primer pair bal86F/plu363R and DNA of different individuals of C. balatonicus from two natural populations. 2 – 7 – population BG-BUR-BL, 8 – 13 – population RU-NSK-KL, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 – positive control (C+); 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13 – MAR6, 14 – negative control to C+; 15 – negative control to MAR6; 1, 16 – 100 bp marker.
steps_raw: Figure 4. PCR products (MAR6) obtained with the primer pair bal86F/plu363R and DNA of different individuals of C. balatonicus from two natural populations. 2 – 7 – population BG-BUR-BL, 8 – 13 – population RU-NSK-KL, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 – positive control (C+); 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13 – MAR6, 14 – negative control to C+; 15 – negative control to MAR6; 1, 16 – 100 bp marker.
